name: sn_c9
drl:
rule R_src salience 10 when $g : G($v : g) then insert(new P($v)); end
rule R_ex_eager no-loop when $p : P() exists(A() and B()) then end
rule R_ex_lazy salience -5 when $p : P() exists(A() and B()) then end
rule R_not_eager no-loop salience -8 when $p : P() not(A() and CM()) then end
rule R_not_lazy salience -10 when $p : P() not(A() and CM()) then end
